title: KTVA Workforce Wednesday Highlights Ahtna
summary: The Alaska Process Industry Career Consortium (APICC) and KTVA’s Daybreak showcase Alaskan workers, training programs and employment opportunities each Wednesday morning on Workforce Wednesday. title: USDA to Measure Final 2017 Row Crop Production and Grain Stocks with Two End-of-Year Surveys
summary: The U.S. Department of Agriculture's National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) is encouraging producers to respond to two upcoming surveys – the December Agricultural Survey and the County Agricultural Production Survey – that are critical to row crop producers around the country.
